sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi provode mnogo vremena na društvenim mrežama.
sentences.translationEn: Many people spend a long time on social networking sites.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ الصُّوَرَ وَالْفِيدْيُوهَاتِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici dijele fotografije i videozapise sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Users share photos and videos with their friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَوَاقِعُ فِي التَّعَرُّفِ عَلَى ثَقَافَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove stranice pomažu u upoznavanju novih kultura.
sentences.translationEn: These sites help in getting to know new cultures.
